title: Investor og Novo-forfatter: Opsplit Novo - det vil løse krisen
summary_md:
# Investor og Novo-forfatter: Opsplit Novo - det vil løse krisen

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-04-20  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

## Summary

Danish podcast debating whether Novo Nordisk should be split into two companies
(GLP-1/obesity drugs vs. legacy pharma) to resolve the investor confidence crisis
following the stock's dramatic decline from peak valuations. Guest author argues
a split would unlock value and clarify the investment case. No Swedish universe
stocks discussed.

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
